center.name: 雀鹀科
center.summary: 雀鹀科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Five-striped sparrow、白斑黑鹀、Yellow-browed sparrow等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Abert's towhee (Melozone aberti) is a bird of the family Passerellidae, native to a small range in southwestern North America, generally the lower Colorado River and Gila River watersheds, nearly endemic to Arizona, but also present in small parts of California, Nevada, Utah, New Mexico, and Sonora in Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The California towhee (Melozone crissalis) is a bird of the family Passerellidae, native to the coastal regions of western Oregon and California in the United States and Baja California and Baja California Sur in Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2020 |title=Five-striped Sparrow Amphispiza quinquestriata |volume=2020 |article-number=e.T22721200A136925390 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2020-3.RLTS.T22721200A136925390.en |access-date=4 May 2026}} | status2 = G4 | status2_system = TNC | status2_ref = | parent_authority = Wolters, 1980 | genus = Amphispizopsis | species = quinquestriata | authority = (Sclater, PL & Salvin, 1868) | range_map = Amphispiza quinquestriata map.svg | synonyms = See text }} The five-striped sparrow (Amphispizopsis quinquestriata) is a medium-sized species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. birds.evidence: atricapilla }} The golden-crowned sparrow (Zonotrichia atricapilla) is a large New World sparrow found in the western part of North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Zimmer, 1941 }} | range_map = Arremon schlegeli map.svg }} The Golden-winged sparrow (Arremon schlegeli) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae that can found in Colombia and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Lincoln's sparrow (Melospiza lincolnii) is a small sparrow native to North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gmelin, 1788) *Ammospiza caudacuta diversa (Bishop, 1901) }} The saltmarsh sparrow (Ammospiza caudacuta) is a small New World sparrow found in salt marshes along the Atlantic coast of the United States

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tumbes sparrow (Rhynchospiza stolzmanni) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae found in Ecuador and Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: First described by Johann Baptist von Spix in 1825, this American sparrow is found across much of the Amazon basin in South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | image2 = Dark-eyed junco - Red-backed race (Junco hyemalis dorsalis) Las Cruces, New Mexico, USA.jpg | image2_caption = Red-backed race | genus = Junco | species = hyemalis | authority = (Linnaeus, 1758) | range_map = Junco hyemalis map.svg | range_map_caption = Range in North America | synonyms = }} The dark-eyed junco (Junco hyemalis) is a species of junco, a group of small, grayish New World sparrows

birds.evidence: Townsend]], 1837 | range_map = Calamospiza melanocorys map.svg }} The lark bunting (Calamospiza melanocorys) is a medium-sized American bunting native to central and western North America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: capensis }} The rufous-collared sparrow or Andean sparrow (Zonotrichia capensis) is an American sparrow found in a wide range of habitats, often near humans, from the extreme south-east of Mexico to Tierra del Fuego, and the island of Hispaniola in the Caribbean.{{cite book |title=Birds of Aruba, Bonaire, and Curacao: A Site and Field Guide |author1=Jeffrey V
